expense.title: Expense
expense.description: A single expense entry for a user

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this expense

itemName.description: The description of the item bought

emojiOrImageUrl.description: Optional emoji or image URL representing the expense

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the expense was created

languageUsed.description: Language used for the item name

users/{userId}/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Expenses belonging to a specific user
